title: BELLE VOUS 72 Pack Clear Glass Votive Tealight & Candle Holder Set - W5 x H6.5cm/1.97 x 2.56 Inches - Crystal Cylinder Centrepiece - Home Ornament, Wedding Table Decoration & Aromatherapy Gift
features: 72 TEALIGHT & CANDLE SET: Included in our set are 72 glass candle holders. Each jar has a height of 6.5cm (2.56 inches) and every container has a diameter of 5cm (1.97 inches) at the top. The jars can hold a maximum of 100ml. The walls of the container feature high quality, thick heavy-duty glass. The glass is plain and transparent. They are suitable for most standard sized candles with a diameter up to 4.8cm (1.89 inches). Candles and tealights are not included.

CRYSTAL CLEAR GLASS VASE: The candle holders are made of glass that is crystal clear. Being clear will enhance the light of the flames from the candles to create a perfect calming, relaxing and romantic atmosphere. Each glass holder is dishwasher safe and has a strong foundation so it will not fall over when lit. The holders are durable and will resist overheating and cracking/shattering the glass. The clear glass allows for individually personalising each of the jars for any occasion.

DIY CANDLE HOLDERS: The holders can be used in DIY projects and can be decorated to match the décor of functions and around the home. Use them as part of woodworking projects and build elegant stands for the jars to fit in or sit on. Create and pour your own waxes into the bulk set of glass holders. These can then be sold or gifted to friends and family. The outside of the jars can be decorated and personalised with paint, stickers and ribbons for holiday decorations, parties and festive events.

SUITABLE FOR ALL OCCASIONS: These candleholders make a special touch around the home on mantle pieces, shelves, dining and coffee tables. They are suitable for both indoor and outdoor. They make ideal table decorations at restaurants, cafes and wedding reception centrepieces. The candles jars can be used with votive candles, flameless LED or wax tea lights. They help to make any room cosy and can be used for meditation and aromatherapy. The jars can also hold small stationery and accessories.

DESIGNED FOR LIFE: Every product in our collection is built with purpose, blending function and style. Our thoughtfully crafted designs ensure lasting reliability and convenience when needed, ideal for any occasion.
description: Belle Vous Tealight Holder Glass Tea Light Holder Transparent (Pack of 72) Our set includes 72 glass tea light holders. Each candle glass is made of clear crystal. The clarity of the glass highlights the light of the flames and creates a calming, relaxing and romantic atmosphere. Create and pour your own waxes into the glass candle holder. The exterior can be customized with paint, stickers and ribbons for holiday decorations, parties and other festive events. Includes: -72 x Glass Candle Holders Dimensions: - Diameter: 5 cm. - Height: 6.5 cm. - Capacity: 100 ml.
